text: Bitcoin and Ethereum are both in red territory, with Ethereum's 4.9% decline outpacing Bitcoin's 2.1% loss, signaling sharper weakness in altcoin conviction. The Fear & Greed index at 13 reflects extreme fear that has deepened over the past week, while Bitcoin dominance holding at 55.9% suggests investors are rotating into the safest asset rather than exiting crypto entirely. Volume at $106B remains moderate, indicating sell pressure without panic liquidation.
